title_en: How to make a gel manicure last four full weeks
title_el: How to make a gel manicure last four full weeks
excerpt_en: The small daily habits that keep an overlay looking fresh long after you leave the studio.
excerpt_el: The small daily habits that keep an overlay looking fresh long after you leave the studio.
body_en:
A gel manicure should hold for three weeks and still look fresh. Most of that is in the prep we do at the desk, but the rest is down to a few small habits at home.

Oil your cuticles every night, wear gloves for washing up, and never use your nails as tools. Book a proper soak-off rather than picking. A lifted edge is how a set starts to fail.
body_el:
A gel manicure should hold for three weeks and still look fresh. Most of that is in the prep we do at the desk, but the rest is down to a few small habits at home.

Oil your cuticles every night, wear gloves for washing up, and never use your nails as tools. Book a proper soak-off rather than picking. A lifted edge is how a set starts to fail.

title_en: The quiet nail looks defining this season
title_el: The quiet nail looks defining this season
excerpt_en: Glazed nudes, fine-line art and the softest chrome. What clients are asking for right now.
excerpt_el: Glazed nudes, fine-line art and the softest chrome. What clients are asking for right now.
body_en:
This season is quiet. Glazed nudes, the softest chrome, and fine-line art so delicate you have to look twice.

Clients are asking for sets that suit their hands rather than a trend. Shorter shapes, warm neutrals, and a finish that looks expensive without shouting about it.
body_el:
This season is quiet. Glazed nudes, the softest chrome, and fine-line art so delicate you have to look twice.

Clients are asking for sets that suit their hands rather than a trend. Shorter shapes, warm neutrals, and a finish that looks expensive without shouting about it.

title_en: Why we only book one client at a time
title_el: Why we only book one client at a time
excerpt_en: A calmer studio is a cleaner, more careful studio. A look at how we run our day.
excerpt_el: A calmer studio is a cleaner, more careful studio. A look at how we run our day.
body_en:
We only ever book one client at a time. It keeps the studio calm, the tools freshly sterilised, and nobody rushed.

A good set cannot be hurried. The cure needs its minutes, the shape needs a second look, and you deserve an hour that is genuinely yours.
body_el:
We only ever book one client at a time. It keeps the studio calm, the tools freshly sterilised, and nobody rushed.

A good set cannot be hurried. The cure needs its minutes, the shape needs a second look, and you deserve an hour that is genuinely yours.
